category_sources: source_facts.description identifies CCTZ as a C++ time zone library.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives cctz; official project commonly styles the name as CCTZ.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is official GitHub repository; README is the project documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has an official repository value; per instruction repo returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and source_facts.homepage describe a C++ library for time zones and civil time.
